name: agent-todo-list
description: Local-first, CRDT-backed todo/project management for AI coding agents

scripts.dev: agt-rs/target/debug/agt serve & until curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/project > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.2; done && cd src/web && bunx vite
scripts.build: cd agt-rs && cargo build --release && bun run --cwd src/web build-only
